result:
All 8 findings addressed across 4 commits. Here's the summary:

| Commit | Findings | What changed |
|--------|----------|--------------|
| `3e73403` | 1, 6 | Added `api/health` to middleware exclusion; deleted smoke-test artifact files |
| `fbf85d2` | 2, 3 | Null section defaults at API layer; VERCEL_URL fallback chain in habits-client; `.env.example` documentation |
| `e5df48d` | 4, 5, 8 | Removed invalid `role="grid"`; added sr-only "(completed)" text to DayCell; switched key to `formatYmd(date)` |
| `ff4d1a2` | 7 | Logout route now redirects to `/login`; Sign out form added to page footer |

Zero deferrals — all were straightforward fixes. Build, typecheck, lint, and all 136 tests remain green.
